description: Legal document from Cairo, dated January 1819 CE (Tevet 5579 AM), in which Moshe Ḥafis (?) and his wife Senyora acknowledge their debt of 2085 esedi gurush to Yehuda Pariente and Saʿadya Agi. The loan also involves and unnamed non-Jew as part of the transaction. The debt is to be paid back in increments of 150 gurush per month and if the couple fail to complete the monthly payments, they pledge a list of personal possessions as collateral. Some or all of the items listed may represent contents of Senyora's wedding trousseau. ASE/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מקהיר, ינואר 1819 (טבת ה'תקע"ט). משה חאפיס ואשתו סניורה מכירים בחובם של 2,085 גרוש אסדי ליהודה פריינטה ולסעדיה אגי. ההחזר 150 גרוש לחודש; הזוג ממשכן חפצים אישיים כערבות.
